EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ICachedRasterFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control cached (item cache) function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3CCF7E76-79C5-4F18-B2E3-4B5E25D89912")]
public interface ICachedRasterFunctionArguments

Properties

CacheBaseName

Name used for generating the CacheFileName. GUID is used if this is not specified.

string CacheBaseName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

ClippingGeometry

The clipping geometry that defines regions of valid pixels. This geometry may have a coordinate system different from the corresponding dataset.

IGeometry ClippingGeometry { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeometry

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressionQuality

The compression quality.

int CompressionQuality { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

CompressionType

The compression type.

esriCachedRasterCompressionType CompressionType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriCachedRasterCompressionType

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxAllowedInputCols

The maximum number of cols allowed in the input raster for generating the cache.

int MaxAllowedInputCols { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxAllowedInputRows

The maximum number of rows allowed in the input raster for generating the cache.

int MaxAllowedInputRows { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Raster

The input raster.

object Raster { get; set; }

Property Value

object

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequestSize

The request size used for resampling the item cache.

double RequestSize { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

RequestSizeType

The unit of the request size is determined by request size type.

esriRequestSizeType RequestSizeType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriRequestSizeType

Examples

Sample Snippet
